title: Convert M4A to FLAC
cap_description: Decode an M4A (AAC-in-MP4) file and re-encode as lossless FLAC
documentation:
## Purpose

Demuxes the audio track from an M4A container, decodes the AAC bitstream, and writes it as FLAC.

## Inputs

An M4A file. AAC and ALAC tracks are supported.

## Outputs

A FLAC file.

args.arg_description: Path to the M4A file to convert
